title: PropertyValueHistory
content:
# PropertyValueHistory


## Properties

- **property_name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the Property.
- **resource** (`string`): Resource to which the value belongs.
- **timestamp** (`string`): UTC time for when the value was updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **source** (`string`): Represents who triggered the value change.
- **value** (`object`): Historical value at the given timestamp.
summary: Object with properties: property_name, resource, timestamp, source, value

resource.description: Resource to which the value belongs.

timestamp.description: UTC time for when the value was updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

source.description: Represents who triggered the value change.

value.description: Historical value at the given timestamp.
